overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character running through rainy Gotham City streets at night. The scene features atmospheric lighting with wet pavement reflections, gothic architecture including a prominent clock tower, and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city sidewalk next to brick industrial building

events.description: city bus passes by on the left side driving parallel to the sidewalk
approaching intersection as the building wall ends and street opens up

agents.ego_description: Batman runs along the wet sidewalk next to a brick building, approaching a street tree and intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: city bus driving along the street with red taillights visible, moving same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial building wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
single leafy tree growing from the sidewalk ahead
large illuminated billboard with advertisement visible above the street
dark colored fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the tree

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Batman running along a narrow wet sidewalk beside a tall brick industrial building. A city bus passes by on the left side of the frame. The camera follows the character as he approaches a street tree and fire hydrant, with a large illuminated billboard visible in the distance through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: moving from the shadow of the building into the more open intersection area with ambient street lighting
traffic light changes from red to green as ego approaches the intersection
begins crossing the street intersection moving from sidewalk to open road

agents.ego_description: Batman crosses the street at the intersection, moving from the enclosed sidewalk into the open plaza area toward the clock tower

entered.detail: ornate black street lamp with suspended traffic signal showing green light
tall gothic clock tower with illuminated clock faces rising in the distance
elevated highway or bridge structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Batman passes the tree and exits the narrow sidewalk, entering a wide open intersection. The traffic light changes to green as he steps onto the crosswalk. A massive gothic clock tower becomes visible in the distance through the rain and fog, while an overpass bridge spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza approaching gothic clock tower landmark

events.description: city bus drives through the intersection from left to right in the background
rain appears to intensify with heavier droplets visible on screen

agents.ego_description: Batman continues running through the open plaza area toward the distant illuminated clock tower

notable_agents.action: city bus driving through the intersection from left to right, crossing ego's path in the distance

entered.detail: low-rise brick industrial structures with illuminated windows on the left side
ornate black street lamp post with bright glowing light

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open intersection, Batman heads toward the prominent gothic clock tower that dominates the skyline. Another city bus passes through the intersection in the background. The scene opens up to reveal industrial buildings on the left and ornate street lamps illuminating the rain-slicked pavement as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial sidewalk into a wide, atmospheric city intersection dominated by gothic architecture. It begins with Batman running along a narrow wet sidewalk beside a tall brick building as a city bus passes by and an illuminated billboard glows through the rain. As he passes a street tree and fire hydrant, the camera follows him out of the narrow corridor and into a broad open intersection just as the traffic light turns green. The scene then expands to reveal a massive gothic clock tower and an overpass bridge emerging through the fog and rain. Finally, the camera tracks forward across the rain-slicked pavement and past ornate street lamps, moving toward the towering clock tower while another bus crosses the background.
